title: 6 Pcs Artificial Pampas Grass Plant,43-45cm Faux Dried Pampas Grass Flower Fake Flower Fluffy Reed Bouquet Reed Grass Decor Dried Flower Arrangements for Wedding Holiday Party Boho Home Decor Pink
features: 【Package includes】You will get 6 pcs artificial pampas grass plant,each stems has 9 forks,the feathers are full and even,maintain the natural beauty of flowers,Adding artistic flavor to the living environment.
【Quality material】Faux dried pampas grass made of quality polyester,free from nasty odours,sturdy and durable,no shedding,fluffy and easy to care.

【43-45cm Large Fluffy Reed】Pampas grass decorations total length about 43-45cm,and the feather length about 38cm,you can adjust the length of the dried flowers according to the needs of the vase.and you will like it.

【Wide application】Our fake reed grass is perfect for living room,bedroom,restaurants,study,or office and more interior decoration,also is great for decoration wedding,party.and will be perfect gifts for your friends and family.
【Easy to care】The stems are artificial which means doesn’t produce pollen,and no need to spray our pampas grass with hairspray,fluffy and durable without any maintenance.
description: Product description 6 Pcs Artificial Pampas Grass Plant,43-45cm Faux Dried Pampas Grass Flower Fluffy Reed Grass Decor for Wedding Holiday Party Boho Home Decor Products details: Name:Artificial Pampas Grass Material:Polyester Color:Gray/White/Beige/Pink(As the pictures shown) Application:Wedding,Party,Office,Hotel,Living room,Home and more Quantity:6 Pieces Products features: 1.Quality matreial,no shedding,fluffy and easy to care 2.Keep the natural beauty of flowers and the feathers are full and even 3.Not release unpleasant odors,perfect for sensitive people who are prone to irritations and allergies Package includes: 6 x Artificial Pampas Grass Note: Product size is manually measured, please allow a small error of 0.1-0.3 cm Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. While this product is low maintenance, it's important to keep it away from small children to prevent choking hazards due to its small parts.
